prompt:
Ingredients arrangement scene — hyper-realistic 1:1 lifestyle product-in-scene photograph, 4K. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Just the product in a natural environment.

ANGLE: a 3/4 ANGLED PERSPECTIVE from above (NOT a pure top-down flat-lay, NOT head-on at eye-level) — the camera looks DOWN at the scene at roughly a 50° angle, showing the jar standing upright with its front label visible AND the surrounding ingredients spread across the wood surface receding into soft-focus depth. The jar is centered. Both the jar's vertical form AND the horizontal ingredient spread are visible.

SCENE: a sun-warmed light-oak wood surface, soft natural daylight. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID on top, jar CLOSED, front label fully legible) stands upright in the center. Surrounding the jar in a clean curated loose arrangement (with breathing room, NOT cluttered): a small bunch of fresh red-purple sea moss fronds laid casually to the upper-left, a sliced burdock root showing its pale interior to the upper-right, a few yellow dandelion flowers and leaves to the lower-left, a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES to the lower-right. 3-4 loose gummy cubes scattered near the jar's base. A folded linen napkin under one section softly.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight from above-left, soft directional shadows on the wood. Clean specular highlight on the jar's curved glossy black plastic and a clean warm highlight on the gold lid's curved edge. Natural drop-shadows around the jar and props on the wood — soft, warm, neutral.

BACKGROUND: the wood surface fills the lower portion of the frame; the upper portion shows soft-focus depth — a hint of a wood wall, a soft white linen backdrop, or open negative space. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

STYLE: hyper-realistic 3/4 angled product-environment photography, 35mm look, f/4 sharp focus across the foreground composition with soft falloff into background, bright clean real-photograph feel. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts. NOT a pure top-down flat-lay.
